query: Compare PostgreSQL vs MySQL vs SQLite for a high-traffic SaaS app. Evaluate on write throughput, replication, operational complexity, and cost. Recommend one with rationale.

which state management library should i use for my react app? compare redux, zustand, jotai, recoil. we're a 5 person team, mostly mid-level, and the app has a lot of cross-cutting concerns (auth, feature flags, server cache)
reccomend a css framework for my team — we're building an internal admin tool in next.js, need good docs and a solid component library. tailwind, chakra, mantine, mui — which one and why?

I need to pick a logging library for our Go microservices (about 12 services on EKS). What are my options and which is best? We care about structured logging, low allocation, and OpenTelemetry integration.

We're choosing between Kafka, RabbitMQ, and NATS for our event bus. Evaluate on throughput, ordering guarantees, operational overhead, and cloud-native support on GKE. Write a recommendation report to share with the platform team.
Research the best vector database for a RAG pipeline over ~50M chunks. Compare pgvector, Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, and Milvus. Save findings to .omo/research-recommended/vector-db/
what's the best ORM for Python these days? working on a django-to-fastapi migration so something async-friendly. need to decide by end of sprint
Help me decide between Terraform and Pulumi for our infrastructure. I care about team learning curve, state management, and how well each plays with our existing CI on GitHub Actions.

shortlist 3-5 feature flag platforms for a 200-engineer org with strict SOC2 requirements. LaunchDarkly is the obvious one but i want to see the field — flagsmith, unleash, posthog, statsig. write up a comparison.
How does React's useEffect cleanup function work? Specifically when the dependency array changes between renders.
can you research how stripe's node sdk handles authentication and idempotency keys? need to understand it before i wire up the webhook handler

diagnose why my pytest suite is failing intermittently on CI but always passing locally. i suspect a fixture ordering issue but i'm not sure
review my system architecture for the order processing service and tell me if it's good. i'll paste the diagram and the main service file
implement rate limiting in my Express app using the existing redis client. 100 requests per minute per IP, with a sliding window.
what are the options for the --format flag in prettier? specifically can i get json output for a CI check?
tell me everything about Kubernetes networking — CNI plugins, services, ingress, network policies. i want a deep dive, not a comparison, just teach me the model
is Redis single-threaded? and if so how does it handle the new IO threads config in 6.x
write a Python script to parse CSV files from s3 and load them into a pandas dataframe with type inference

need to choose an APM/observability stack for our k8s platform. comparing datadog, new relic, grafana cloud, and self-hosted prometheus+grafana+tempo+loki. budget is ~$80k/year. score them on cost predictability, ease of onboarding for app teams, and trace quality.
